# LLMs.txt for Le Royals International Club

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Allow public pages
Allow: /
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /membership
Allow: /lric.internalion

# Disallow sensitive/payment pages
Disallow: /payment
Disallow: /lric-pay
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /success

# Disallow personal data or private content
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /user
Disallow: /private

# Policy
Usage: Allow summarization, indexing, and linking of public content.
Attribution: Required when content is used externally.
Training: Allowed only on public, non-sensitive content.

# Contact
Contact: https://leroyalsinter.netlify.app/contact
